name: Pumpkin Bars
recipeInstructions:
Frosting
2 cups powdered sugar
1/3 cup butter
3 ounces cream cheese
1 tablespoon milk
1 teaspoon vanilla
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Prepare a 15x10 inch pan (large sheet).
3. Blend all bar ingredients and mix at low speed for 2 minutes.
4. Pour into the prepared pan and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
5. Cool completely.
6. Combine frosting ingredients and spread over cooled bars.
7. Store in refrigerator.
